title: Yooper Creoles: Finnish Music in Michigan's Copper Country
original_title: Yooper Creoles: Finnish Music in Michigan's Copper Country
overview: When the immigrants came to America, their cultures entered the "great melting pot." In Michigan's Upper Peninsula Finnish immigrants mixed their musical traditions with many other cultures, creating a sound that was unique to the "Copper Country."
